description: The Rollin' 60s Neighborhood Crips is a set of the Crips street gang alliance based in Los Angeles, California, founded in 1976 from the Westside Crips. It is one of the largest gangs in the Los Angeles area with an estimated 1,600 members. The gang is involved in racketeering, murder, drug trafficking, and other crimes, and has spread to other U.S. cities.
